description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential structure with a prominent gable roof and a small porch at the front. The building sits on a rectangular plot with a defined yard area, featuring a few scattered shrubs and a fenced section. The roof is pitched and extends over the porch, providing shelter at the entrance. The windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern, with a main door centrally located on the front facade. The exterior appears to be constructed from wood or similar materials, with a muted, uniform color palette. The surrounding yard includes a small fenced area and some landscaping elements, suggesting a suburban or semi-rural setting.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, front porch, and a small fenced yard, surrounded by minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gable roof, main entrance, porch, and some landscaping elements.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the back of the bungalow, fenced yard, and less visible entrance.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the front porch, main door, and the arrangement of windows and yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side/rear view showing the back of the bungalow and the fenced area with minimal landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
